project.title: human breast cancer cell line LC-MS/MS
project.projectDescription: Triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) is the most aggressive type with poor prognosis among the breast cancers and has a high population of cancer stem cells (CSCs) which are main target to cure and inhibit TNBC. In this study, we analyzed the CSC-related proteome alteration by NEDD4 knockdown in CSC-abundant MDA-MB-231 cells by LC-MS/MS analysis.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: To prepare tryptic peptides for LC-MS/MS analysis, FASP was performed according to the previously report in siCONT and siNEDD4-treated MDA-MB-231, respectively. Briefly, cells were lysed by SDT-lysis buffer (4% SDS, 100mM Tris-HCl (pH7.6), 0.1M DTT). And then, total 250 μg of proteins extracted by urea buffer (8M urea in 0.1M Tris-HCl (pH 8.5)) were alkylated and digested by trypsin in FASP filters on the shaking incubator at 250rpm overnight at 37 °C. Digests were dried by centrifugation under vacuum. For quantitative comparison, TMT 6-plex labeling were performed with 80 μg of tryptic peptides according to the manufacturer’s instruction (Thermofisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: To prepare tryptic peptides for LC-MS/MS analysis, FASP was performed according to the previously report in siCONT and siNEDD4-treated MDA-MB-231, respectively. Briefly, cells were lysed by SDT-lysis buffer (4% SDS, 100mM Tris-HCl (pH7.6), 0.1M DTT). And then, total 250 μg of proteins extracted by urea buffer (8M urea in 0.1M Tris-HCl (pH 8.5)) were alkylated and digested by trypsin in FASP filters on the shaking incubator at 250rpm overnight at 37 °C. Digests were dried by centrifugation under vacuum. For quantitative comparison, TMT 6-plex labeling were performed with 80 μg of tryptic peptides according to the manufacturer’s instruction (Thermofisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA).

Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermofisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, United States)
EASY-nLC 1200 (Thermofisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, United States)
Comment[FractionationMethod]: fractionated to three by styrene divinylbenzene–reversed-phase sulfonate
Comment[Separation]: The LC gradient was initiated with 5% buffer B, increased to 8% buffer B over 1 min, 10% buffer B over 16 min, 40% buffer B over 79 min, and then maintained at 80% buffer B for 9 min and 2% buffer B for an additional 15 min at a flow rate of 300 nl/min.
